outlook.volatilityExpectation: ELEVATED: Negative GEX across all expiries (-11.94B cumulative) indicates dealers are short gamma, amplifying price movements. Expect 2-3x normal volatility on directional moves.
outlook.summary: Heavy bearish positioning with extreme Put/Call ratios (1.73-3.01) and pronounced smirk skew (2.0-2.41). Market pricing significant downside protection. Spot at 6740 trapped between 6700 support and 6815 Max Pain magnet. Negative gamma environment favors mean reversion strategies until a directional breakout. MONTHLY_1 is the only positive GEX expiry (+3.95B), suggesting institutional stability at higher strikes.

levels.motivazione: Massive 5-expiry resonance with 248K CALL OI in MONTHLY_1 alone. Primary dealer resistance zone. MONTHLY_2 shows 145K PUT OI creating complex hedge dynamics.
levels.sintesiOperativa: RESISTANCE: Major wall, scale out longs

levels.motivazione: 5-expiry PUT resonance with consistent OI (5908-29539). Major dealer support anchor. 2.14% below spot provides strong structural floor.
Mixed CALL/PUT interest across 5 expiries creates equilibrium zone. MONTHLY_1 shows 88K CALL + 87K PUT - classic pinning level. Near WEEKLY_2 Max Pain.
First line of defense, 40 pts below spot. 4-expiry PUT confluence. High IV (36-43%) indicates active hedging.
Secondary support with 4-expiry PUT interest. Weekend risk hedge zone. Volume spike (1647 vol in 0DTE) confirms active trading.
0DTE Max Pain 1.1% above spot. Dealer target zone. Combined with WEEKLY_1 Max Pain (6830) creates magnetic zone.
Highest CALL OI (8106) in 0DTE expiry. Intraday resistance with elevated IV (12.5%). Break above targets 7000.
Highest 0DTE PUT OI (7849). Last resort support, 3.6% below spot. Crash protection zone. High volume (2849) confirms institutional interest.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low to moderate - positive total GEX suppresses volatility, spot pinned at gamma inflection
outlook.summary: Market at critical gamma flip inflection point (24643 vs 24645). Positive total GEX (~1.72B) provides stability. Bearish short-term skew (0DTE/W1) indicates fear premium on puts. Max pain levels above spot (24700-25500) create upward magnetic attraction. Dealers long gamma will suppress volatility and pin price near current levels.

levels.motivazione: Spot at gamma neutral threshold. 0DTE/W1/W2 gamma flips clustered at 24625-24650. Critical inflection - flip to positive stabilizes, negative amplifies moves.
Multi-expiry structural support: 0DTE (197 OI), WEEKLY_1 (296 OI), MONTHLY_2 (1674 OI). Same exact strike across 3 expirations. Deep institutional positioning.
Massive 4031 OI call resistance in MONTHLY_1. Dominant structural ceiling. Dealers will hedge by selling into rallies near this level.
WEEKLY_1 max pain + dominant call wall (584 OI). Also present in MONTHLY_1 (219 OI). MM target creates upward price attraction.
Multi-expiry put support: MONTHLY_1 (783 OI), MONTHLY_2 (186 OI), 0DTE (111 OI). Deep structural floor with bearish skew confirmation.
0DTE dominant call resistance (232 OI). Nearest structural ceiling for intraday. Volume/OI ratio >1 indicates active trading.
0DTE dominant put support (222 OI). Nearest structural floor for intraday. High volume (286) confirms activity.
WEEKLY_1 put support (112 OI) + MONTHLY_1 dual concentration (1038 CALL/555 PUT). Near-spot support zone with mixed positioning.
